processing_screen.stop_confirmation: Stop generating? Progress will be lost.

billing.title: Billing & Subscription
billing.description: Manage your subscription and billing details
billing.subscription_description: Your current plan and billing details
billing.payment_success: Payment completed successfully. Your subscription is now active.
billing.checkout_canceled: Checkout was canceled. You can resume anytime from this page.
billing.portal_returned: Returned from billing portal. Changes usually sync within a few moments.
billing.no_billing_profile: No active billing profile was found. Select a plan to restore billing access.
billing.portal_hint: Use the billing portal to update payment methods, invoices, or cancellation settings.
billing.no_billing_hint: Your account is on a paid plan without an active billing profile. Restore billing to manage subscription details.
billing.upgrade_hint: Upgrade to a paid plan to unlock billing portal access and self-service subscription management.
billing.restore_tooltip: Your account is on a paid plan but no active payment was found. This can happen after a failed renewal or manual plan assignment.
billing.cancellation_notice: Your subscription will be cancelled on {date}. You'll keep full access until then.
billing.past_due_title: Payment failed — your account is past due.
billing.past_due_description: Update your payment method to avoid losing access to your features.
billing.service_unavailable: Billing service is temporarily unavailable. Please try again.
billing.welcome_success: Welcome to {label}! Your subscription is now active.
billing.processing_notice: Your subscription is still being processed. This page will update shortly — please refresh in a moment.

team.invite_validation_email: Please enter a valid email address
team.confirm_remove_member: This user will lose access to the team workspace.

integrations.title: Integrations & Accounts
integrations.description: Manage your connected social media accounts and integrations
integrations.instagram_description: Manage your connected Instagram Business profiles
integrations.team_card_description: Invite team members and manage access roles
integrations.team_card_hint: Collaborate with your team by inviting members to your workspace.
integrations.sync_success: Accounts synced. Paused posts have been automatically re-queued and will publish shortly.
integrations.connect_x_hint: Click Connect X Account to add another X account while logged in. Pro plan: up to 3 accounts · Agency: up to 10 accounts.
integrations.character_limits: Character limits: Free X accounts can post up to 280 characters. X Premium subscribers can post up to 2,000 characters per post.
integrations.tier_info: The colored dot next to each account shows its subscription tier. Use the refresh icon to update tier status.
integrations.token_expired_warning: Token expired — posts will fail until you reconnect.
integrations.account_limit_exceeded_message: Your {planName} plan allows {planLimit} X account{planLimit, plural, one {} other {s}}. You have {activeCount} active account{activeCount, plural, one {} other {s}}. Please deactivate {excess} account{excess, plural, one {} other {s}} or upgrade your plan.
integrations.remove_dialog_desc: Scheduled posts for this account will be cancelled. You cannot undo this action.
integrations.deactivate_dialog_desc: This account will be deactivated and won't be able to post scheduled content. You can reactivate it anytime. Scheduled posts for this account will be cancelled.
integrations.cannot_remove_last: Cannot remove the last connected account. Please add another account first.
integrations.cannot_deactivate_last: Cannot deactivate the last connected account. Please add another account first.
integrations.disconnect_instagram_desc: Are you sure you want to disconnect @{username}? You can reconnect it later.
integrations.disconnect_linkedin_desc: Are you sure you want to disconnect {name}? You can reconnect it later.
integrations.voice_profile_description: Train the AI to write exactly like you by analyzing your best tweets.
integrations.voice_profile_pro_title: Voice Profile is a Pro feature
integrations.voice_profile_pro_desc: Upgrade to Pro to create your custom AI voice profile.
integrations.voice_active_notice: Your Voice Profile is active! All AI-generated content (threads, hooks, rewrites) will now automatically match this style.
integrations.voice_samples_desc: Paste at least 3 of your best performing or most representative tweets.
integrations.voice_analyze_description: We'll analyze these samples to determine your tone, vocabulary level, emoji usage, and formatting habits. This profile will be used automatically when you use the AI Writer.
integrations.voice_analyze_error: Failed to analyze samples. Please try again.
integrations.voice_delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete your Voice Profile? AI will revert to generic style.
integrations.voice_validation_samples: Please provide at least 3 sample tweets (min 10 chars each).
integrations.privacy_data_desc: Manage your personal data and account existence.
integrations.privacy_export_desc: Download a copy of your personal data (GDPR).
integrations.privacy_delete_desc: Permanently delete your account and all data.
integrations.privacy_delete_confirm_desc: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete your account and remove your data from our servers.
integrations.tier_cooldown: Tier was recently refreshed. Please wait before refreshing again.

hashtag_generator.language_description: Hashtags will be prioritized based on regional trends

marketing.hero_title: Supercharge Your X Presence with AI
marketing.hero_subtitle: Schedule threads, generate viral content with AI, and track your analytics. AstraPost is the all-in-one tool for serious creators.
marketing.features_subtitle: Stop wasting time on manual posting. Automate your workflow with powerful tools designed for growth.
marketing.feature_scheduling_desc: Plan your content weeks in advance. Drag and drop calendar view makes it easy to visualize your strategy.
marketing.feature_ai_writer_desc: Generate viral threads, hook ideas, and polished tweets in seconds using our advanced AI models.
marketing.feature_analytics_desc: Understand what works. Track impressions, engagement rates, and follower growth over time.
marketing.cta_ready_subtitle: Join thousands of creators who are growing their audience with AstraPost.
marketing.cta_no_credit_card: No credit card required • 14-day free trial

pricing.features_subtitle: Start with powerful tools and unlock more as you grow.

features.title: Everything you need to master X
features.subtitle: AstraPost provides a comprehensive suite of tools to help you grow your audience, engage with your community, and monetize your content.
features.scheduling_desc: Plan your content weeks in advance. Drag and drop calendar view makes it easy to visualize your strategy.
features.ai_writer_desc: Generate viral threads, hook ideas, and polished tweets in seconds using our advanced AI models.
features.analytics_desc: Understand what works. Track impressions, engagement rates, and follower growth over time.
features.affiliate_desc: Turn product links into high-converting tweets automatically.
features.team_desc: Work together with your team. Assign roles and manage multiple accounts.
features.crossposting_desc: Sync your content across platforms (Coming Soon).
features.cta_subtitle: Join thousands of creators using AstraPost to grow their audience.

community.hero_subtitle: Connect with thousands of creators, share your wins, get feedback on your content, and grow together.

community.benefit_amas_desc: Chat with top creators and the AstraPost team.

common.thank_you_staying: Thank you for staying with AstraPost!

post_failure.subject: Your post failed to publish
post_failure.body: We weren't able to publish your post. This can happen due to API rate limits, token expiration, or connectivity issues.

trial_expired.subject: Your trial has ended
trial_expired.body: Your 14-day free trial of AstraPost Pro has ended. Upgrade now to continue using advanced features like AI Writer, Analytics, and Team collaboration.
trial_expired.upgrade_description: Choose the plan that fits your needs and continue creating amazing content.

trial_ending_soon.subject: Your trial is ending soon
trial_ending_soon.body: Your AstraPost Pro trial ends in {count} days. Don't lose access to AI-powered content creation and analytics.
trial_ending_soon.days_left: {count, plural, one {# day left} other {# days left}}
trial_ending_soon.without_payment: Without a payment method on file, your account will be moved to the Free plan when your trial ends.

cancel_scheduled.subject: Your subscription cancellation is confirmed
cancel_scheduled.body: Your subscription has been marked for cancellation. You will continue to have Pro access until the end of your current billing period on {date}.
cancel_scheduled.access_until_end: You'll continue to have full access to all features until that date. After that, your account will be moved to the Free plan.
cancel_scheduled.reactivate_before_end: If you change your mind, you can reactivate at any time from your account settings before the cancellation date.

reactivated.subject: Your subscription has been reactivated
reactivated.body: Great news! Your AstraPost Pro subscription has been reactivated. You continue to have full access to all Pro features.

subscription_cancelled.subject: Your subscription has been cancelled
subscription_cancelled.body: Your AstraPost Pro subscription has been cancelled. You now have access to the Free plan features. We'd love to hear your feedback.
subscription_cancelled.resubscribe_anytime: You can resubscribe at any time from your account settings.

payment_failed.subject: Payment failed for your subscription
payment_failed.body: We were unable to process your payment. Please update your payment method to avoid service interruption.
payment_failed.grace_period: Your account will remain active during the grace period, but service will be interrupted if payment is not updated.

payment_succeeded.subject: Payment confirmed — Thank you!
payment_succeeded.body: Your payment of {amount} was successful. Thank you for choosing AstraPost Pro!

team_invite.subject: You've been invited to join {teamName} on AstraPost
team_invite.body: You have been invited to join a team on AstraPost. Collaborate on content creation, scheduling, and analytics together.
